ox. When the user presses the Grasp button, this runs an algorithm to grasp a block. The algorithm is run in a separate thread and the user can cancel. Parameters: parent - The parent Frame tools - The OrthoTweezersTools used to control

me tools - The OrthoTweezersTools used to control the system. The underlying OrthoTweezersControl is obtained from this. Method Detail execute public void execute () throws CancelException This is called when the new t
